channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VINYLINDIA] Vinyl Chemicals to Hold 40th AGM on June 5, 2026
item.description:
Vinyl Chemicals (India) Ltd will hold its 40th Annual General Meeting on June 5, 2026, via video conferencing. The record date for determining members eligible for the dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, is fixed as May 22, 2026. Subject to shareholder approval at the AGM, the dividend payment will be made on or after June 15, 2026, after deducting tax at source.

  • Vinyl Chemicals' 40th AGM scheduled for June 5, 2026, via video conference.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is May 22, 2026.
  • Dividend payment, subject to approval, will be on or after June 15, 2026.
  • Dividend payment will be subject to tax deduction at source.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINYL CHEMICALS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [ROSEMER] Rose Merc Allots 50,500 Equity Shares on Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Rose Merc Ltd's Allotment Committee approved the allotment of 50,500 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹10 each upon conversion of warrants held by 2 warrant holders. This corrects a typographical error in a previous disclosure. Post allotment, the paid-up capital stands at ₹6,19,41,850 consisting of 61,94,185 equity shares of ₹10 each.

  • Rose Merc allots 50,500 equity shares upon conversion of warrants.
  • 2 warrant holders, Bharat Ramdas Karnik and Salil Divakar Deshpande, received shares.
  • Post-allotment paid-up capital stands at ₹6,19,41,850.
  • The allotment was approved at a meeting held on May 06, 2026.
  • Issue price was ₹90 (including premium of ₹80).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ROSE MERC.LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [CHEMKART] Chemkart India Board Meeting on 18 May 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Chemkart India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 18, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the half-year and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares by designated persons and their immediate relatives remains closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these results, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Chemkart India's board will meet on May 18, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the half-year and financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post result declaration as per SEBI norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chemkart India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JAIMATAG] Jai Mata Glass Board Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Jai Mata Glass Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the appointment of an Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities remains closed until May 16, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Appointment of Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until May 16, 2026, for designated persons.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's head office in New Delhi.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAI MATA GLASS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VOEPL] Virtuoso Opto gets nod for Fund Raising up to ₹250 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Virtuoso Optoelectronics Ltd. has received board approval to raise funds up to ₹250 Crores through the issuance of equity shares, eligible securities, or convertible instruments via permissible modes such as QIP, preferential issue, or rights issue. The fund-raising is subject to regulatory and statutory approvals. The company will seek shareholder approval in the upcoming General Meeting or through postal ballot.

  • Virtuoso Opto board approves fund raising of up to ₹250 Cr.
  • Funds to be raised via equity, securities, or convertible instruments.
  • Methods include QIP, preferential issue, or rights issue.
  • Shareholder approval will be sought in the upcoming General Meeting.
  • Meeting commenced at 03:30 P.M. and concluded at 04:10 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Virtuoso Optoelectronics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IRFC] IRFC Board Meeting on 14 May 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will also cover other financial statements, including the Cash Flow Statement and Statement of Assets and Liabilities. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • IRFC board to approve audited financial results on May 14, 2026.
  • Meeting includes review of cash flow and asset/liability statements.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post result declaration.
  • Trading restrictions apply to designated persons and immediate relatives.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PAJSON] Pajson Agro IPO Proceeds: ₹1.96 Cr Shifted to General Purposes
item.description:
Pajson Agro India Ltd reported a deviation in the use of IPO proceeds. While the initial prospectus outlined ₹8.98 crore for issue expenses, the actual expense was ₹7.02 crore. The remaining ₹1.96 crore was reallocated to General Corporate Purposes (GCP) with board approval on December 26, 2025. The Audit Committee reviewed and approved this reallocation. The company raised ₹74.45 crore through its SME IPO on December 16, 2025.

  • Pajson Agro reallocated ₹1.96 Cr from issue expenses to General Corporate Purposes.
  • The reallocation was approved by the board on December 26, 2025.
  • IPO raised ₹74.45 crore via fresh issue on December 16, 2025.
  • CARE Ratings Limited is the monitoring agency.
  • Audit Committee reviewed the deviation in fund utilization.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pajson Agro India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GLOBUSSPR] Globus Spirits: FY26 Results, Dividend of ₹6.53 Approved
item.description:
Globus Spirits Ltd's board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. They recommended a dividend of 65.30%, which is ₹6.53 per equity share for FY 2025-26, pending shareholder approval. Additionally, the board approved the allotment of 12,373 equity shares to employees under the ESOP 2021 plan, increasing the issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital to ₹29,08,03,410. M/s SCV & Co., LLP was appointed as the Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. The auditor's report has an unmodified opinion.

  • Globus Spirits board approves FY26 financial results.
  • Dividend of ₹6.53 per share recommended for FY26.
  • 12,373 equity shares allotted under ESOP 2021.
  • Issued capital increases to ₹29,08,03,410 post-allotment.
  • M/s SCV & Co., LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GLOBUS SPIRITS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WONDERLA] Wonderla's Q4 Revenue Up 32% YoY, EBITDA Surges 64%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Wonderla Holidays Ltd. reported its highest-ever Q4 and FY26 revenue, driven by the strong performance of the newly launched Chennai Park. Total income for Q4 FY26 increased by 32% YoY to ₹14,205 lakhs, with EBITDA up by 64% YoY to ₹5,001 lakhs. For FY26, total income rose by 14% YoY to ₹55,108 lakhs and EBITDA increased by 12% YoY to ₹19,245 lakhs. The company's resort businesses also delivered their best-ever Q4 performance. Footfalls for Q4 FY26 reached 8.79 lakhs, a 30% increase YoY.

  • Q4 FY26 total income increased by 32% YoY to ₹14,205 lakhs.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA surged 64% YoY to ₹5,001 lakhs.
  • FY26 total income rose by 14% YoY to ₹55,108 lakhs.
  • Chennai Park contributed significantly to revenue growth.
  • Resort businesses delivered their best-ever Q4 performance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wonderla Holidays Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SIRCA] Sirca Paints Recommends ₹2 Dividend, Subject to AGM Approval
item.description:
Sirca Paints India Ltd's Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share (20% of face value of ₹10) for the financial year 2025-26. This recommendation is subject to the approval of shareholders at the upcoming 21st Annual General Meeting. The board meeting, held on May 7, 2026, also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Sirca Paints recommends a final dividend of ₹2 per share.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Board approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Meeting held on May 7, 2026, considered and approved the dividend and financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sirca Paints India Ltd | Category: Dividend
